quote: FY 2024 revenue RMB 393,836.1M ($53,955.3M), +59% YoY; FY 2023 revenue RMB 247,639.2M, +90% YoY; FY 2022 revenue RMB 130,557.6M, +39% YoY
FY 2024 net income RMB 112.4B ($15.4B), +87.3% YoY; cash, cash equivalents & short-term investments RMB 331.6B ($45.4B) as of Dec 31, 2024
Q3 2025 total revenue RMB 108,276.5M ($15.2B), +9% YoY; cash position RMB 423.8B ($59.5B)
Market cap ~$145.7B; trailing P/E 10.47-10.72; forward P/E 8.44; EV/EBITDA 6.63; net cash position $58.03B ($40.87/share)
5-year average P/E 19.71; 10-year median P/E 19.03; current P/E of ~10.5 is 44% below 10-year median
Q1 2025 operating profit RMB 16,085.6M vs Q1 2024 RMB 25,900M, decline of 38% YoY; net income fell 47% YoY to RMB 14,740M
Q2 2025 non-GAAP operating margin ~27% vs ~36% in Q2 2024, a 9 percentage point compression
VIE & subsidiaries share of total revenue declined from 56.2% (FY2022) to 22.5% (FY2024), reflecting growing dominance of international (Temu) revenue through non-VIE subsidiaries
Transaction services revenue grew from 21% of total in FY2022 to ~50% in FY2024, with +241% YoY growth in FY2023 and +108% in FY2024
CEO Lei Chen: 'In our global business, radical change in the external policy environment, such as tariffs, has created significant pressure for our merchants.'

VP Finance Jun Liu: 'Revenues growth further moderated this quarter amid intense competition. As we remain focused on long-term value creation, the sustained investments may continue to weigh on short-term profitability.'
Co-CEO Jiazhen Zhao: 'Assessing the company's performance solely through the short term financial performance or capital returns does not fit where we are at our development stage.'
August 2025 MAU: Pinduoduo app recorded 540.57 million monthly active users in China (iiMedia Research)
November 2024 MAU: Pinduoduo 720 million; Taobao 960 million; JD.com 570 million (QuestMobile)
Duo Duo Orchard: over 11 million daily active users play the gamified feature; nearly 2 million new virtual trees planted daily at launch
More than 60% of Pinduoduo users come from third and fourth-tier cities
Douyin 2024 GMV: ~RMB 3.5 trillion, up 30% YoY; shelf e-commerce GMV grew 49% YoY, contribution rising from 30% (2023) to 40% (2024) to ~50% (2025)
Douyin Aug 2024-Jul 2025 GMV increased 34% YoY; shelf e-commerce contribution reached ~50% during 618 festival
Pinduoduo invested at least RMB 50 billion ($7.1 billion) over five years for rural online retail programs; goal to foster 1 million rural online shops each generating >RMB 1M annual revenue
106 manufacturer-owned brands launched under New Brand Initiative; product development cycles shortened by 50%; agricultural GMV of $42 billion; connects ~869M active buyers with 16M farmers
RMB 100 billion (~$13.7B) merchant support program over three years; RMB 10 billion fee reduction; non-GAAP operating margin dropped from 33% (Q1 2024) to 19% (Q1 2025)
2024: Temu was the #1 most downloaded shopping app worldwide, leading retail app download charts in 15 major markets including US, UK, Germany, France, Japan, and Brazil
Temu remained #1 in global shopping app downloads for third consecutive year (2023-2025), with 363 million downloads in 2025
Global MAU (August 2025): 530 million (record high); US MAU: 133.6 million (down 28% YoY); EU MAU: 141.6 million (up 74% YoY, 34% of global user base)
Cumulative downloads exceeded 1.2 billion by October 2025; 2024 annual downloads 484.31 million
Temu lost 58% of daily US visitors after the de minimis exemption ended; US daily users fell ~48% vs March 2025
Temu plummeted to #73 in US App Store after 97% cut in US ad impressions following 145% tariff announcement; recovered to #3 in shopping downloads by mid-2025
Morgan Stanley: temu.com traffic dropped 81% and visitors dropped 78% from March to May; US app downloads declined 85% YoY; only 18% of US consumers shopped on Temu in past 3 months (record low)
Temu's share of US Google Shopping ad impressions went from 20% (April 5) to 0% (April 12); paid search traffic dropped 77%
Pre-tariff surge: revenue +46% in March 2025 YoY, +60% in early April (frontloading); full-year 2025 US GMV estimate $24-27 billion; European GMV on track to surpass $15 billion in 2025
Import charges of ~145% added to products: $18.47 dress became $44.68 total; $12.44 bathing suit became $31.12 total
De minimis exemption eliminated for China/HK effective May 2, 2025; parcels subject to 54% tariff or $100 flat fee; processing time went from 2-4 hours to 2-4 days
One Big Beautiful Bill Act passed July 4, 2025: permanently repeals Section 321 effective July 1, 2027; civil penalties up to $10,000 for order-splitting

July 29, 2025: European Commission preliminarily found Temu in breach of DSA; potential fine up to 6% of global annual turnover; mystery shopping found consumers 'very likely to find non-compliant products'
December 10, 2025: European Commission raided Temu's European HQ in Dublin as part of Foreign Subsidies Regulation probe; second FSR dawn raid ever
New platform pricing rules jointly issued by NDRC, SAMR, and CAC: ban platforms from imposing 'lowest price' agreements on merchants; effective April 10, 2026

SAMR 2026 priorities: intensified antitrust enforcement, curbing 'cutthroat competition'; draft antitrust compliance guidelines for internet platforms address algorithmic collusion, below-cost sales, forced exclusivity
Late 2023: Temu shipping ~1 million packages/day in US; mid-2025 post-tariff: ~250,000-300,000 packages/day
China to US West Coast rate $2,127/FEU, down 55-60% YoY; 9+ million TEU of new container ships to be delivered in 2026
Temu Trustpilot rating: 2.5 out of 5 stars from ~48,709 reviews; 34% 5-star reviews
Rate of likely AI-generated reviews on Temu's Trustpilot increased 1,361% from 2022 to 2025 (0.75% to 10.90%)
Euroconsumers testing: ~2/3 of products non-compliant; only 1 of 27 chargers tested met safety requirements; 5 classified as 'high severity' electrical safety failures
Temu active US warehouse job locations: Middletown PA, Philadelphia PA, Dallas-Fort Worth TX, San Diego CA, Aurora CO; pay $17-$26/hr for warehouse associates
Alibaba Q2 FY2026 revenue RMB 247,795M ($34.8B), +5% YoY; customer management revenue +10% YoY; 88VIP members surpassed 56 million
JD.com Q3 2025 revenue RMB 299.1B ($42.0B), +14.9% YoY; quarterly active customers up 40%+ YoY; marketing costs up 110.5% YoY
TikTok Shop 2025 global GMV US$64.3 billion, nearly doubled from $33.2B in 2024; US GMV $15.1-15.8B, up 68-108% YoY
Amazon total GMV surpassed $800 billion in 2025; US GMV ~$440B (~37.6% of US e-commerce); 3P seller share 69% of total GMV
Shein 2024 revenue ~$38 billion (+19-23% YoY); 2024 net profit ~$1.0-1.1B (down 40% despite revenue growth); 2025 projected revenue ~$60B
Restricted net assets in China: $14.3 billion as of FY2024; holders of ADSs do NOT have direct or indirect equity interests in the VIE or its subsidiaries
GuruFocus GF Value: $211.95 (Significantly Undervalued); analyst average price target $137.55 (+34.9% upside); consensus rating Buy
RMB 10 billion Agriculture Initiative launched August 2021 from company profits; supports digitalization of agriculture and sustainability in rural farms
China e-commerce market: $1.53 trillion (2025), forecast $2.52T by 2030 (CAGR 10.42%); online share of retail 30-35%; user penetration 86.3%
PDD enterprise value ~$85-86 billion; EV/EBITDA 5.3x, 22% below historical median of 6.8x
Amazon Haul: 24% of US consumers tried it at least once, but only 16% purchase monthly vs 28% monthly for Temu; 40% of Temu consumers drop off due to delayed shipping

All US orders now fulfilled domestically post de minimis repeal; top 50% of best-selling items pre-stocked in US warehouses; ~1,000 Chinese sellers onboarded to store inventory in US-based forward/3PL warehouses
